---
title: "Processing the raw results data of the study."
format: 
    html:
        code-fold: true
jupyter: 
    kernel: python3
    executable: ../../.venv/bin/python

---

The following modules will be needed. If the poetry set up worked (see README.md), all of the modules should be importable without issue.

```{python}
import os
```

First, we need to ensure the code will find the raw data files. We will use relative paths. If there are any FileNotFound errors, this is probably where you need to look.

```{python}
data_root = "../raw_data"
assert os.path.isdir(data_root)
```
